mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ORDER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TOTAL_ORDER ( ORDER_NO, ORDER_ID, MEMBER_NO, ORDERER_NAME, EMAIL, RECIPIENT, RECIPIENT_TEL, POSTCODE, BASIC_ADDRESS, DETAIL_ADDRESS, DELIVERY_REQ, PAYMENT_METHOD, TOTAL_AMOUNT, GOODS_AMOUNT, DELIVERY_AMOUNT, ORDER_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{orderId}, #{memberNo}, #{ordererName}, #{email}, #{recipient}, #{recipientTel}, #{postcode}, #{basicAddress}, #{detailAddress}, #{deliveryReq}, #{paymentMethod}, #{totalAmount}, #{goodsAmount}, #{deliveryAmount}, 'READY' )

SELECT SEQ_ORDER_ITEM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ORDER_ITEM ( ORDER_ITEM_NO, ORDER_NO, GOODS_NO, GOODS_OPTION_NO, QTY, UNIT_PRICE ) VALUES ( #{orderItemNo}, #{orderNo}, #{goodsNo}, #{goodsOptionNo}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TOTAL_ORDER SET PAYMENT_KEY = #{paymentKey}, ORDER_STATUS = #{orderStatus}, APPROVED_AT = #{approvedAt}, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_BANK = #{virtualAccountBank}, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{virtualAccountNumber}, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_DUE_DATE = #{virtualAccountDueDate} WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT OI.ORDER_ITEM_NO, OI.ORDER_NO, OI.GOODS_NO, OI.GOODS_OPTION_NO, OI.QTY, OI.UNIT_PRICE, G.GOODS_NAME, GO.GOODS_SIZE, GO.GOODS_COLOR, (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) AS THUMBNAIL FROM ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN TOTAL_ORDER O ON OI.ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO JOIN GOODS G ON OI.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_OPTION GO ON OI.GOODS_OPTION_NO = GO.GOODS_OPTION_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON G.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 WHERE O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE GOODS_OPTION SET STOCK = STOCK + #{qty}, VERSION = VERSION + 1 WHERE GOODS_OPTION_NO = #{goodsOptionNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT O.ORDER_NO, O.ORDER_ID, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS ORDER_DATE, O.ORDER_STATUS, O.TOTAL_AMOUNT, O.PAYMENT_METHOD, O.TRACKING_NUMBER, O.DELIVERY_COMPANY,
-- 첫 번째 상품 정보 (서브쿼리) (SELECT G.GOODS_NAME FROM ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN GOODS G ON OI.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO WHERE OI.ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS FIRST_GOODS_NAME,
(SELECT (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) FROM ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON OI.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO WHERE OI.ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 AND ROWNUM = 1) AS FIRST_THUMBNAIL,
-- 총 상품 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDER_ITEM WHERE ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO) AS TOTAL_ITEM_COUNT
FROM TOTAL_ORDER O WHERE O.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC

SELECT O.ORDER_NO, O.ORDER_ID, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS ORDER_DATE, O.ORDER_STATUS, O.TOTAL_AMOUNT, O.PAYMENT_METHOD, O.TRACKING_NUMBER, O.DELIVERY_COMPANY,
(SELECT G.GOODS_NAME FROM ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN GOODS G ON OI.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO WHERE OI.ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS FIRST_GOODS_NAME,
(SELECT (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) FROM ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON OI.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO WHERE OI.ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 AND ROWNUM = 1) AS FIRST_THUMBNAIL,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDER_ITEM WHERE ORDER_NO = O.ORDER_NO) AS TOTAL_ITEM_COUNT
FROM TOTAL_ORDER O WHERE O.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND O.ORDER_STATUS = #{orderStatus} ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC

SELECT ORDER_NO, ORDER_ID, TO_CHAR(ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS ORDER_DATE, ORDER_STATUS, APPROVED_AT, ORDERER_NAME, EMAIL, RECIPIENT, RECIPIENT_TEL, POSTCODE, BASIC_ADDRESS, DETAIL_ADDRESS, DELIVERY_REQ, PAYMENT_KEY, PAYMENT_METHOD, TOTAL_AMOUNT, GOODS_AMOUNT, DELIVERY_AMOUNT, TRACKING_NUMBER, DELIVERY_COMPANY, TO_CHAR(DELIVERED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELIVERED_AT, CANCEL_REASON, CANCELED_AT, REFUND_STATUS, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_BANK, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_DUE_DATE FROM TOTAL_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TOTAL_ORDER SET ORDER_STATUS = 'CANCELED', CANCEL_REASON = #{cancelReason}, CANCELED_AT = SYSDATE, REFUND_STATUS = 'REQUESTED' WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND ORDER_STATUS IN ('READY', 'WAITING_FOR_DEPOSIT', 'PAID')
UPDATE TOTAL_ORDER SET TRACKING_NUMBER = #{trackingNumber}, DELIVERY_COMPANY = #{deliveryCompany}, ORDER_STATUS = 'SHIPPING' WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
UPDATE TOTAL_ORDER SET ORDER_STATUS = 'DELIVERED', DELIVERED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
